user_goal: Analyze production 5xx error log to identify failure patterns and root cause, then address code quality issues in the API handler that complicate debugging.

routing_decision.reason: P0 production incident with 18% error rate requires immediate log analysis to guide incident response; code quality refactoring in api/handler.ts is important but non-urgent and deferred until incident is resolved.

task_contract.goal: Reduce logs/error-5xx.log to a structured failure summary identifying error patterns and root cause.

files.why: P0 incident context: 5xx spike at 08:45 UTC, 18% error rate, customer impact
production error log showing mix of upstream timeouts, auth failures, and rate limit errors

must_not: invent log lines not present in the source
speculate on fixes before analysis is complete
